entry.title: IDC DJB1PC016 (2) awarded to CORRECTIONS CORPORATION OF AMERICA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CLOSELY ASSOCIATED - MOD 2 IF FOR JABS/CAS- AND SPECIAL MANAGEMENT UNIT ITEMS. -PROVIDE SERVICES FOR THE MANAGEMENT AND OPERATION OF A CORRECTIONAL FACILITY IN ACCORDANCE WITH RFP-PCC-0017.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
